titleStmt.title: SII 37.187: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 187. (A.R. No. B 71 of 1939-40.) Ōgūru, Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab near the shrine of Gaṅgamma.
This is dated Śaka 1159, Hēmaḷaṁbin, Māgha śu. 11, Monday, corresponding to 1238 A.D., January 27, However the weekday is Wednesday.

It records the consecration of god Mallināthadēva at Oṁgūru and the gifts of land made to the temple for daily worship of the god by Nala Sūrapa Nāhiḍu, a servant of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kāmayadēva Mahārāju of the Mukkanṭi Kāḍuveṭṭi family (pallava family). It also mentions Mallajiyya, Mupajiyya and Pinnajiyya the sthānapatis of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti caraṇa sarōruha vihita vi
ḷōcana triḷōcana pramukhākhiḷa prithi
vīśvara kārita kāvēritīrakarikālakula
ratnapradīpala ri ye pavāda satata sama
bhyarccita lakṣmīśvara O ṟa Ūrapuravarādhīśva
ra kāsyapagōtra pavitra kāṁcīpura tripura tri
nētra Aticatura kāminījana jayaṁta tu
raga rēvaṁtta vitaraṇa vinōda vikramāditya teṁ
kaṇāditya Ayyana siṁhyāsāhasōttuṁga
pridhivīśvara śiraḥ kaṁdukhaḥ(ka) krīḍāvinōda maṁ
ḍaḷika diśāpaṭṭakīrttinārāyaṇa nāmādi
samasta praśasti sahitaṁ . śrīmaṁnmahā
maṁḍaḷēśvara gaṁḍagōpāḷa tirukāḷati
dēvacōḍamahārāju sukhasaṁkadhā
vinōdaṁbuna rājyaṁbu sēyucuṁ
ḍagā sakavarśaṁbulu 1159 Agunē
ṭi hēmaḷaṁbi saṁvatsaramuna māgha su
11 sōmavāramunāṁḍu svasti samasta praśa
sti sahitaṁ . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara śrī
mukaṁṭakāḍuveṭṭi vaṁśāvatāruṁḍaina ja
dobbagaṁḍa vīranārāyaṇa kāmayadē

va mahārājunaku nija bhrityuṁ
ḍaina nalasūrapanāhiḍu yēpuṟēlakaṁ
namu peṁnā dakṣiṇānanu Ōṁgūranu
mallinādhadēvaranu pratiṣṭha sēsi Ādēva
raku Aṁgabhōgamunaku dhūpadīpanivē
dyaṁbunakuṁ vritiyēṭi Aṁdu paḍu
maṭi hānu ceṟu
vukiṁdi ṭa ceṟuvu
nadi velipolamu
paḍumaṭa yeṟanēla
ceṟu napaṭini Ikaṁ
mu dhārāpūrvakamu
ccina dēvadatti I guḍi kāstānāpatu
lu mallajiyya mupajiyya piṁnnajiyya
ṁnu śrī Idēvuṁḍokaḍu naḍapinavāru Anēka
puṁṇyaphalaṁ valanaṁ boṁduvāru Ivrittiki ye
varokaḍu dalacinavāru sisuvadha gōvadha
gaṁgakaṟtavēIgavila peddakoḍku kapāḷamu
naṁ kuḍcinavāru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō
harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭhirvvarśa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . dēcaṁḍaru
muṁḍu paṭṭuvōli ṇināhiḍu sēsinakā
Digital edition of SII 37.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
